name: name
description: Name of the icon either as CSS var (e.g. --as-icon-document-solid) or without --as-icon- prefix. Name of the icon must be defined as CSS variable and contain SVG code as base64 string.

name: size
description: Size of the icon component. Defaults to size "m"
propertyType: xs | s | m | default | l | xl | xxl | xxxl

name: color
description: Colour of the icon. Colour can be any valid colour by name, hex value or passed as CSS var. Defaults to --as-color-text

name: label
description: An accessible label for the icon. If no label is supplied, the icon is hidden from assistive technology.

name: flip-x
description: Flips icon image horizontally. Can be used together with [flip-y] property.

name: flip-y
description: Flips icon image vertically. Can be used together with [flip-x] property.

name: rotate
description: Rotates icon by whatever angle is specified. Numeric value can be in [deg], [turns] or [rad]. Can be a negative value. Unit must be specified.

name: image
description: When present renders icon as image element. Useful when we SVG's we hold as CSS variables were multi-colour initially.

name: locale
description: Pipe-delimited string, when present defines component descriptive texts, defaults to Select multiple options|Search...|more

name: size
description: value used to calculate dot & gap size. Dot size is 20% and gap size is 25% of the value.

name: popout-position
description: Represents popout position relative to the toggle button. Values are: top, center, bottom.

name: popout-align
description: Represents popout alignment relative to the toggle button. Values are: left, right, span-left, span-right, span-all, span-top, span-bottom, center. Last three values are valid only with popout-position: center

name: popout-id
description: When present is used to tie button and popout element with custom ID, defaults to dynamically generated random ID.

name: button-text
description: When present defines text used on the popout toggle button, defaults to Open popout.

name: button-class
description: When present defines class used on the popout toggle button, defaults to btn.

name: breakpoint
description: When present defines breakpoint in pixels below which the popout is displayed inline. Defaults to 0.

name: breakpoint
description: Defines mobile breakpoint in pixels, defaults to 520.

name: heading-class
description: Panel to work should contain minimum two elements inside, one for panel heading and one for panel body. Defaults to panel-heading.

name: body-class
description: Panel to work should contain minimum two elements inside, one for panel heading and one for panel body. Defaults to panel-body.

name: icon-name
description: When present icon name is passed to <as-icon> component within panel structure. Default icon view is defined for folded-in layout of the component. Defaults to --as-icon-plus.

name: rotate
description: When present defines direction and angle of the icon rotation when component is toggled between states (fold-in & fold out). Defaults to -45deg.

name: sort
description: If present sorting functionality is enabled.

name: filter
description: If present filtering functionality is enabled.

name: columns
description: Coma separated list of column names to replace existing table <THEAD> cell labels, in the order written. If there are no <THEAD> on the table this parameter must be provided.

name: omit
description: Coma separated list of column indexes to be omitted when enabling sorting & filtering functionality. Starts from 0

name: data-table
description: ID or class name of the table to attach actions to.

name: button-text
description: When present defines table Actions component button text. Defaults to Options.

name: selected
description: When present within <as-tab> declaration marks active tab. If no of the <as-tab> elements has selected attribute by default first tab is set to selected.

name: value-missing
description: defaults to "This field is required"

name: too-long
description: defaults to "This field is too long"

name: too-short
description: defaults to "This field is too short"

name: range-overflow
description: defaults to "This field has a number that is too big"

name: range-underflow
description: defaults to "This field has a number that is too small"

name: type-mismatch
description: defaults to "This field is the wrong type"

name: pattern-mismatch
description: defaults to "This fields value does not match the pattern"

name: data-input
description: ID or class name of the textarea or input element to perform count on.

name: no-messages
description: hides messages count.

name: no-count
description: hides characters count.

name: labels
description: Coma separated list that defines button labels for show & hide states. Defaults are Show, Hide

name: icons
description: Coma separated list of CSS variable names of icons to be displayed instead of text labels. Text labels are instead used as aria-label values for the icons. Icon names order in the parameter is "show, hide"

name: yearspan
description: When present allow to define number of years that will be available within calendar year select that stretch into past and future plus current year. Defaults to 20.

name: breakpoint
description:
Allows to define viewport breakpoint in pixels below which date picker component will turn off calendar and calendar buton and make text input a type="date" to allow system date pickers to work. Above breakpoint date picker returns to default behaviour.

You can "hack" displaying one or the other by setting up breakpoint to 0 to always show component's calendar or to be high value (e.g. 20000) to make sure date picker fall back to system default. Defaults to 800

name: locale
description: When present allow to overwrite page lang attribute settings. This is used to generate month names in calendar month select and day names. If date picker locale attribute is not present or no lang attribute is present it defaults to 'en'.

name: placeholder
description: This is placeholder of the input field. Can be passed within input field attributes, or in this case within component attributes. If non of these are present it defaults to current date.

name: reverse
description: Internally date picker component operates on date in ISO format (YYYY-DD-MMT00:00) but if for some reason date display is needed in DD-MM-YYYY format then reverse attribute can be used to make it so.

name: disabled
description: when present disables date picker from user input entirely.

name: options
description:
Name of the JS variable that holds array of options objects. Can be defined anywhere, as long as it is accessible on the page with Command menu component.

Example of option object:
{
title: "Mine aftaler",
keywords: "alle mine aftaler",
shortcut: "Alt+A",
section: "Sager",
handler: () => {
setTimeout(() => location.href = "https://google.com"}, 100)
}
}
Command menu allow to search by typing option name. Search is performed on text from title and keywords keys

name: locale
description:
Name of the JS variable that holds locale objects. Can be defined anywhere, as long as it is accessible on the page with Command menu component.

Locale object:
{
navigate: "Navigate",
select: "Select",
dismiss: "Dismiss",
drag: "Hold & drag",
reset: "Reset",
open: "Menu",
placeholder: "Type a command or search...",
nohits: "No results for",
hint: "Search tips: some search terms require an exact match. Try typing the entire command name, or use a different word or phrase."
}

name: keys
description: Define keyboard shortcut to open command menu dialog. Can be any combination, though safest is using Meta key + another key. Meta is Command or Windows or any other meta modifier key (e.g. on Chromebooks)

name: action
description:
defines actual action link to perform search. Must include URL param for search term at the end of the string. Link must be an actual page that can perform search.
Example:

action=search&searchmethod=0&search=

name: search-page-id
description: defines search page ID

name: method
description: defines form method, defaults to post.

name: keys
description: Define keyboard shortcut to open command menu dialog. Can be any combination, though safest is using Meta key + another key. Meta is Command or Windows or any other meta modifier key (e.g. on Chromebooks), defaults to 'Meta+U'

name: placeholder
description: defines form method, defaults to post.

name: nohits
description: defines text for when typing the search term does not return any recent search, defaults to No recent search queries matches...

name: hint
description: defines text shown when typing the search term does not return any recent search, defaults to Search tips: some search terms require an exact match. Try typing the entire sentence, or use a different word or phrase.

name: navigate
description: defines text shown in footer for the first info icon, defaults to Navigate.

name: enter
description: defines text shown in footer for the second info icon, defaults to Select.

name: dismiss
description: defines text shown in footer for the third info icon, defaults to Dismiss.

name: drag
description: defines text shown in footer for the fourth info icon, defaults to Hold & drag.

name: position
description: value that marks the position from which drawer will show. defaults to 'bottom'

name: button-text
description: text on the button that opens up drawer

name: transition-time
description: defines drawer opening/close transition time, defaults to 400ms

name: size
description: value defines size of the gauge in EM units, default value is 3

name: showmax
description: if present gauge is displaying max value defined within max parameter

name: thumb
description: value defines thumb colour, if omitted it defaults to --as-color-status-success

name: track
description: value defines track colour, if omitted it defaults to --as-color-text-neutral

name: bg
description: value defines background colour of the gauge element colour, if omitted it defaults to transparent

name: reverse
description: if present it animates value thumb counterclockwise.

name: half
description: if present gauge is displayed as half circle.

name: delay
description: defines delay before animation of the thumb value starts, in milliseconds. If omitted it defaults to 1000. For no delay and instant animation start use 0 as param value.

name: speed
description: defines time in which thumb reaches set value, in seconds. If omitted it defaults to 1. To make gauge thumb appear instantly use 0 as param value.

name: datetime
description: date & time can be inserted as attribute value.

name: notime
description: when present date time value displays only date part.

name: update
description: numeric value in minutes on how often relative time text should update with a new value. Omitted means no relative time updates.

name: disabled
description: when attribute is present actual date is displayed as default. Users can still click on the component to get relative time value.

name: target-element
description: Pipe '|' separated element list to toggle classes on. Accept any proper CSS selector.

name: target-class
description: Pipe '|' separated class names (with or without leading dot) to be toggled on target-element elements.

name: target-state
description: when true target-element initiates with target-class applied.

name: button-text
description: text for the button

name: button-class
description: Space separated class names list to be used on the generated button

name: icon-name
description: icon name, when present generated button will contain trailing <as-icon> element displaying icon passed as attribute value. See icons here.

name: icon-rotate
description: when present it will rotate icon when target-element has target-class applied.

name: size
description: value used to calculate dot & gap size. Dot size is 20% and gap size is 25% of the value.

name: digit-bg
description: digit dot background

name: digit-color
description: digit character color

name: slideid
description: parameter name used as slide element identifier, defaults to item

name: speed
description: define slide animation speed in [ms], defaults to 400

name: delay
description: define slide animation delay in [ms], defaults to 3

name: gap
description: reflects gap between slides, should match CSS gap property, defaults to 14

name: data-data
description: parameter in a form of an JSON object formatted as string. Contains some additional settings and actual data points to be displayed within graph component.

name: data
description:
holds data point informationExample of data point object:{
  "label":"2024",
  "value":127.85,
  "unit":"kWh",
  "level":0,
  "drilldown": {"data":{[...]}},
}Notice drilldown key, that if present, can hold more detailed data about the current data points, e.g. data divided into weeks data points. Similarly, weak data point can hold daily data, then hourly data and so on. There's no limit on the number of data levels present.

name: resolution
description: key in data-data object

name: step
description: key in data-data object

name: charttype
description:
key in data-data object, if present defines initial chart type to use. Chart types are as follows:
1. Columns chart
2. Pie chart

name: title
description: key in data-data object, if present defines chart / graph title.

name: xtitle
description: key in data-data object, if present defines chart / graph X axis title.

name: ytitle
description: key in data-data object, if present defines chart / graph Y axis title.

name: palette
description: key in data-data object to hold table with RGB colours used within graph component to colour data points. It can contain from one to Infinite colours. Data points are coloured in cycle if number of colours is not equal to maximum number of data points within data level.

name: controls
description: when present graph will render control buttons that allow to change how many data points are displayed at once, allow adding & removing visible data points, move between point and go bac one level if drill down data are present.

name: markers
description: when present graph type of Pie chart will display labels and drill down icon (a + sign).

name: data-total
description: this holds total number of records returned on list page from Overview > Main layout > Counter text > {x} value and should be typed as is data-total="{x}"

name: data-page-size
description: this holds number of records per page and MUST match Overview > Main layout > Overview > Max. number per page value

name: data-pagination-text
description: pipe separated list of text with pagination info, defaults to "Page|of|from|records|Previous|Next"

name: icon-name
description: When present defines name of the <AS-ICON> element created on the left of tab name. Name follow Icon component rules.
